corpus.title: Follow-up: Global Health Institute — Propagated Report
corpus.snippet: Follow-up coverage: A study reported that air pollution exposure above 10 µg/m³ ...
corpus.content:
Breaking: Global Health Institute faces continued scrutiny amid reports circulating about scientific

Multiple sources now confirm: A study reported that air pollution exposure above 10 µg/m³ was associated with a 27% increase in respiratory hospitalizations. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in scientific strategy. A spokesperson for Global Health Institute declined to comment beyond the official statement.
